items.title: Hollander POTD Dikembe Mutombo. Georgetown C drafted 4th by DEN in 91. Peaked in ppg as rook w/16.6. Had awkward O game but D was incredible. 4x DPOY had 4.5 bpg in 95-96 led NBA in boards in 99-00 & 00-01. Lasted forever as backup (2008-09). Made HOF in 2015. RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Dikembe Mutombo. Georgetown C drafted 4th by DEN in 91. Peaked in ppg as rook w/16.6. Had awkward O game but D was incredible. 4x DPOY had 4.5 bpg in 95-96 led NBA in boards in 99-00 & 00-01. Lasted forever as backup (2008-09). Made HOF in 2015. RIP.

items.title: Some Celtics news out of Europe this morning:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Some Celtics news out of Europe this morning:

Hugo Gonzalez will suit up for Spain for FIBA World Cup Qualifiers on July 2 and July 5.

Las Vegas Summer League starts on July 9. Whether Gonzalez will play for the Summer Celtics is TBD.

items.title: The LA Clippers will be adding Purdue shooting guard Fletcher Loyer on a E10, per team source
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
The LA Clippers will be adding Purdue shooting guard Fletcher Loyer on a E10, per team source

Loyer made 309 3s in four years at Purdue, at 41.1 percent. He is also the son of Clippers director of pro scouting John Loyer
